titleStmt.title: SII 24.343: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 343. (A.R. No. 62 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land after purchase, for providing certain offerings to the god in the name of Paḷḷikoṇḍaperumāḷ Kaṟpūram Maḻavarāyar alias Aḻagiya-Maṇavāḷadāsar and four houses (two of them from Uttama-Nambi) where Mushṭimādhukaram was to be served. Among the boundaries of the land is mentioned a garden called Mahāpātram-tōppu. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1393, Khara, Mīna ba. 7, Sunday, Kēṭṭai correspond regularly to A.D. 1472, March 1, Sunday, ·89, ·93.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakābdam 1000 3 100 9 10 3 ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa kharasamvatsarattu mīṉa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu saptamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa keṭṭai nāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅgarājaṟku
paḷḷikoṇṭa perumāḷ kaṟpūram maḻavarāyar Āṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷadāsar kaiṅkaryyam Āka tirumālai cātti Aruḷavum teṅkāy Amutu ceytu Aruḷavum payiṟceyvitākavum senāpati
pperuvilai Āka koṇṭa tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati tirumuṭikkuṟaiyil cumanta karaikku mahāpātram toppukku meṟku naṭuvil karaiyil nañcey nilattil varampukku vaṭakku paṇṭāra nilattukku kiḻakku
nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa Irācavipāṭaṉāl kuḻi 1000 2 100kku vilai poṉ 4 10 8 Intap poṉ nāṟpattu Eṭṭukkum vilai Āka koṇṭu tirumālai cātti Aruḷavum teṅkāy Amutu kaṟi Amutu Amutu ceytu Aruḷum
paṭikku candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum § Ituvum muṣṭimādhukaram parimāṟat takkatāka śrī senāpatip peruvilaiyāka koṇṭa kiḻai māṭat tiruviti teṉ tuṇṭattu mel ciṟakil paṇṭāra maṉaikku teṟku paṇṭāramaṉai Āy
sādhūbhaṭṭar Ācci Irunta maṉaikku vaṭakku tiruppāṟkaṭal tirumatiḷukku kiḻakku tiruvitikku meṟku nāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa maṉaikku 2 kku maṉai kol 3 kku vilai Āka koṇṭa poṉ 10 2 Ituvum Uttamanampi kaiyil
koṇṭa vikkiṟamacoḻaṉ tiruvitiyil kiḻaittiruvitiyil vaṭa tuṇṭattil koṟṟi Ammai maṉaikku vaṭakku viṇṇappañceyvār tirunaravuṭaiyāṉ maṉaikku teṟku Āriyapaṭṭakaḷil paṭṭapiḷḷai maṉaikku
meṟku tiruvitikku kiḻakku nāṉ kellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa maṉai 2 kku maṉai kol 3 kku vilai Āka koṇṭa poṉ 10 5 Āka maṉai 4- kku vilaippaṭi poṉ 2 10 7 Intap poṉ Irupatteḻukkum koṇṭa maṉai
nālilum muṣṭimādhukaram parimāṟi candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.343 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
